item.title: 양곡 집 / 한국 고전 번역원, Yanggok chip / So, Se-yang, 1486-1562, author.
item.description: Location: EAST-ASIAN BOOKSTACKS, Call Number: PL988.S592 A199 2025, Publisher: Han'guk Kojŏn Pŏnyŏgwŏn, Sŏul-si :, 2025.0
